utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Listen , Robert gonna be here any second so , will one of you just tell him ?

emotion_cause.span: 1_Robert gonna be here any second so , will one of you just tell him ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Please , right now , no , every time I see him it is like Is it on the lose ? Is it watching me ?

emotion_cause.span: 3_every time I see him it is like Is it on the lose ? Is it watching me ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: We can not tell him , you can not go up to a guy you barely know and talk about his ... stuff .

emotion_cause.span: 4_We can not tell him , you can not go up to a guy you barely know and talk about his ... stuff .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: He is right , even if it is to say something complementary .

utterances.speaker: Robert
utterances.text: So you ready for the gym ? They have got this new rock climbing wall , we can spot each other .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: No , I can spot you from here .
